children.label: Custom ID
children.help_text: Name cannot start with a number. Only use valid css characters

children.name: custom_classes

children.name: custom_data_attributes
children.label: Custom attributes
children.help_text: Must be valid data attribute. Cannot end in a space or period. Google "valid html data-attribute " if you need help
